text: Here's what science actually says about mucosal immunity. Mucosal immunity is our first line of defense against pathogens. It protects surfaces like our gut, lungs, and nose. Studies show that mucosal antibodies can neutralize viruses before they invade. But wait! Preliminary research suggests there's so much more to uncover. Mucosal immunity could even be key in developing future vaccines. Curious about how your body defends itself? Hit that follow button for more science!
